title: Ambrosia
description: Replacing Enchanted golden apple with Ambrosia
body:
🍃 This Resource Pack change _Enchanted golden apple_ and making it into **Ambrosia**

![Ambrosia](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43ca0000cd10954bbb480a0f90cd2c2176b3cbc5.png)

# 
**Changes:**
- 🎨 New texture
- ⚙️ Item name
# 

🌱 Long lost **ambrosia** lies hidden in the ruins and ancient chests of this world... don't underestimate its power...
